_publications._publicationTitle: Longitudinal phenotype development in a minipig model of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Here, through longitudinal tracking of CALMs we found the minipig presentation showed similarity in size (1.0 cm–5.0 cm)...we have tracked individual CALM from 4 to 12 months of age...finding that CALMs in minipigs across this time period are stable is size.
details: CALMs in minipigs showed similarity in size to humans (1.0 cm–5.0 cm) and remained stable in size from 4 to 12 months of age
